title: helichrysum × mouterdei
intro: Helichrysum × mouterdei is a hybrid plant species within the Helichrysum genus, known as the 'Immortelle' or 'Everlasting' plant. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum × mouterdei include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum × mouterdei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
